subject: Rufflet, a small eaglet-like bird creature perched with wings spread
description: A small fluffy eaglet-like bird creature perches with its wings spread wide in a lush forest setting. The figure has a round, fluffy body with pale feathers on its chest, darker wing feathers, and a small yellow beak. Its wings are fanned out in a bold display posture. The background shows dense green foliage and leafy trees. The creature's expression and open-wing pose convey boldness despite its small size.
foreground: small eaglet-like bird with wings spread wide, fluffy feathers
